_meta.title: Budget Video Production Pipeline
_meta.description: 低成本视频生产管线：T2I → I2V(Budget) → LipSync/Audio
_meta.author: PostGrad#11 Session
_meta.notes: Uses Kling 2.6 + budget-tier models for cost-effective video production

inputs.prompt: A professional spokesperson in a modern office, clean background, facing camera, neutral expression, studio lighting, photorealistic, 4K
The spokesperson slightly nods and begins to speak naturally, subtle hand gestures, professional demeanor, smooth camera, cinematic quality

_meta.title: Step 2: I2V with Kling 2.6 (Budget Pro)
_meta.notes: Kling 2.6 pro is $0.07/sec, 5s = $0.35. Audio off to add LipSync later.

inputs.text: Welcome to our product launch. Today I'm excited to show you something revolutionary.

_meta.title: Step 3: Lip Sync with TTS
_meta.notes: Kling LipSync syncs mouth to generated speech. Max 120 chars text.
